content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Xor-Paths". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1006/F
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of vertices in the graph. The next n-1 lines contain two integers u and v, representing an edge between vertices u and v. The next line contains an integer m, the number of queries. The next m lines contain two integers u and v, representing a query about the XOR of the path between vertices u and v.
content.outputFormat: For each query, output the XOR of the path between the given vertices.

solution.approach: Use a depth-first search to find the XOR of the path between each pair of vertices.
